title: How to automate your business?
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
Anyone know about how to automate your business?

posts.author: Yoroflow (Yoroflow)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
Anyone know about how to automate your business?

posts.author: Bianca (Bianca Clement)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Yoroflow
My name is Bianca, and I am a freelancing monday Expert.
I specialise in helping businesses get the most out of monday and maximise their automations!
Feel free to email me at biancajclement@gmail.com if you’d like to have a conversation.

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Yoroflow ~ Welcome to the community!

We actually have some great guides to help you learn more about our automation and integration capabilities! Check out these articles for more details:

  • monday.com Automations
  • Build your own custom automation
  • monday.com Integrations

We also have these two Webinars you can check out on demand to learn more:

  • Basic Automations Webinar
  • Advanced Automations Webinar

You can find more live and on demand webinars through our Webinar Hub

Feel free to elaborate on any specific automations you were trying to build as well and I would be happy to provide any recommendations.

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: Michaela_Staffova (Michaela)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @Yoroflow Michaela from Integromat here. This is a great question

Automation is gradually becoming more and more important to every business owner since it

  • eliminates tedious tasks
  • improves efficiency and accuracy of processes
  • increases productivity and performance of employees
  • minimizes human error

I could go on

Like mentioned above - you can totally use the native monday automations when automating your monday-related business process.

If you’re, however, looking for extra functionality when it comes to automating your tasks, you might want to check out Integromat. It’s a no-code platform that lets you connect monday to any other online service and automate all kinds of tasks and processes.

To see what the options are when it comes to streamlining the workflows that contain monday, you can check out the pre-built integration on Integromat and learn about its features (triggers, actions and pre-made templates).

Speaking of the pre-made templates for monday, there is a whole bunch of them. You simply grab them, set them up and activate them.

A digest of the templates:

Screenshot 2021-10-12 at 8.55.26954×1169 205 KB

Integromat also allows you to design and build automated workflows that are totally specific to your business. It’s a universal and flexible tool that lets you automate pretty much anything

Screenshot 2021-10-12 at 9.00.18938×376 54.5 KB

If you’re liking what you’re seeing, you can sign up for a free account and start exploring the exciting world of automation
